name: Cynthia L Fairure
ai_summary: Cynthia L Fairure from Georgia has extensive experience in daycare and afterschool programs, having worked at Sunshine House and Kids Academy. She is CPR certified (though expired) and has an upcoming recertification session, demonstrating commitment to child safety.
